content:
# Session 41 (iter-041) ‚Äî Review Summary

## Metadata
- Route B SOLO, fine-grained; root `TensorObjSubstrate.lean` FROZEN (untouched, sorry-free).
- File: `AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/TensorObjInverse.lean`. `lake build ‚Ä¶TensorObjInverse` ‚Üí **EXIT 0** (green-mod-sorry).
- File leaf sorries: **6 ‚Üí 7** (added B1+B2 bridge lemmas as 2 new named sorries; closed S4c's body).
- Cocycle `exists_tensorObj_inverse` still closes modulo `trivialisation_restrict_compat` (unchanged, green).

## Headline
**One square genuinely closed.** `trivialisation_uIota_restrict_compat` (S4c, the unit square) went from a bare
`sorry` to a **complete, sorry-free proof body** (lean-auditor + lean-vs-blueprint-checker both confirm
honest, no axioms). The closure required a NEW reframe: route the square through the *pullback* world via a
new bridge **B2** (`restrictFunctorIsoPullback_comp_compat`). S4c is "CLOSED mod B2" ‚Äî its own body is
sorry-free; it transitively `rw`s through B2's still-open sorry.

This validates the iter-041 analogist reframe (`basechange-squares041`): the squares DO route through the
project's own base-change composition laws via two bridges B1/B2, contra the iter-039 keystone over-sell.

## Targets

### S4c `trivialisation_uIota_restrict_compat` ‚Äî SOLVED (mod B2) [L337‚Äì382]
Recipe (reusable, see Knowledge Base):
- `simp only [unitRestrictIso, Functor.mapIso_trans]` then `rw [restrictFunctorIsoPullback_comp_compat j hjŒπ ‚Ä¶]`
  ‚Äî B2 rewrite cancels the shared `restrict`-prefix.
- (i) `hslideH := (restrictFunctorIsoPullback j).hom.naturality (pullbackUnitIso U.Œπ).hom` ‚Äî applied via
  `reassoc_of% hslideH` (assoc form).
- (ii) `hunitH` = pullback-side unit composition law = PROVEN `pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp j U.Œπ`
  (`(pullbackUnitIso f).hom = pullbackObjUnitToUnit f` defeq) after cancelling the `pullbackComp` prefix.
  The `pullbackCongr hjŒπ` eqToHom shim handled by a **generalized `transport`**:
  `‚àÄ {Yv} (f‚ÇÅ f‚ÇÇ) (h : f‚ÇÅ = f‚ÇÇ), (pullbackCongr h).hom.app ùüô ‚â´ (pullbackUnitIso f‚ÇÇ).hom = (pullbackUnitIso f‚ÇÅ).hom`
  proved `intro ‚Ä¶; subst h; simp [pullbackCongr]` ‚Äî morphisms MUST be variables (`subst hjŒπ` directly fails:
  `V.Œπ` is not a variable).
- Assembly: `apply Iso.ext; simp only [Iso.trans_hom, Functor.mapIso_hom, Category.assoc, Iso.app_hom];
  rw [reassoc_of% hslideH]; rw [‚Üê hunitH]; rfl`. **Trailing `rfl` mandatory** ‚Äî `rw`'s reducible auto-rfl
  leaves the `SheafOfModules`-defeq goal; explicit `rfl` at default transparency closes.

### B2 `restrictFunctorIsoPullback_comp_compat` ‚Äî PARTIAL [L196‚Äì219]
- NEW named bridge. Statement elaborates cleanly (the type-match record the planner asked for): the
  `V`-restriction-to-pullback comparison factors through `restrictCompReindex` (restrict side) +
  `pullbackComp`/`pullbackCongr` (pullback side).
- LHS reduction VERIFIED in-body via `apply Iso.ext; apply (restrictAdjunction V.Œπ).homEquiv _ _ |>.injective;
  rw [Adjunction.homEquiv_unit, ‚Ä¶]; simp only [restrictFunctorIsoPullback, Iso.app_hom];
  rw [Adjunction.unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app]` ‚Üí discharges LHS to `(pullbackPushforwardAdjunction V.Œπ).unit.app A`.
- RESIDUAL sorry: RHS composite's unit-image ‚Äî a `leftAdjointUniq`-across-composition coherence
  (`conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv` + `unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app` at U.Œπ/j + `hjŒπ` eqToHom). ~40‚Äì60 LOC.
  No Mathlib lemma; `restrictFunctorIsoPullback` has zero downstream lemmas (grep). **Lynchpin: S2/S3/S4c all
  `\cref` B2.**

### B1 `tensorObj_restrict_iso_eq_pullbackTensorMap` ‚Äî BLOCKED (root privacy) [L238‚Äì246]
- NEW named bridge (iso‚Üîmap). Statement carries an EXTRA explicit hyp `(hiso : IsIso (pullbackTensorMap f M N))`
  because the witness `pullbackTensorMap_isIso_of_isOpenImmersion` is `private` in the FROZEN root.
- Body `sorry`: deep content `Œ¥ = e.hom` is the `hcompat` `have` *inside* that private isIso proof (root L4812).
  Re-deriving downstream is a >100-LOC mate calculus. **iter-042 owes a thin additive root extraction**
  (de-`private` the witness, or export `hcompat`/`Œ¥=e.hom`). Blocks S2 ‚Üí S4b.

### S2/S3/S4a/S4b + telescope ‚Äî BLOCKED (unchanged scaffolds)
- S2 needs B1; S4b needs S2; S3 is the dual gap (route b unverified); S4a needs S3; telescope wires all 5.

## Reviewer audits (both dispatched this iter)
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker (tensorobjinverse041):** No fake/excuse bodies; all 7 sorries blueprint-authorized
  open obligations. **1 must-fix:** B1 `\lean{}` pin `‚Ä¶eq_pullback_tensor_map` named a non-existent decl (real:
  `‚Ä¶eq_pullbackTensorMap`) ‚Äî **FIXED by review** (see Blueprint markers). 2 major (B1 missing IsIso hyp in prose;
  B2 sketch under-sold), 3 minor (S2 diagram leg; S4a/S4b œÅ-vs-unitRestrictIso wording). Report:
  `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-tensorobjinverse041.md`.
- **lean-auditor (iter041b; re-dispatched ‚Äî original iter041 dispatch died with no report):** Clean bill,
  0 critical. S4c genuine proof; `transport`/`hslideH`/`hunitH` real, used, non-circular; `hunitH` via
  `pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp` + `Iso.hom_inv_id_app` + `rfl`. No axioms/native_decide/excuse-comments.
  **1 major:** stale comment at L356 `-- RESIDUAL: the only un-discharged step.` precedes a fully-proved
  `hunitH` (misleading). 3 minor (19 long lines in comments; iter-number annotations in docstrings).
  Report: `task_results/lean-auditor-iter041b.md`.

## Key findings / patterns
- **The bridge reframe works.** The squares are NOT free from `restrictFunctorComp.hom.naturality` (iter-040
  finding stands) but DO route through two new bridges B1 (iso‚Üîmap) + B2 (restrict‚Üîpullback reindex coherence).
  S4c is the proof-of-concept: closed via B2 alone.
- **Root-privacy is now the gating blocker for the ‚äó side** (B1 ‚Üí S2 ‚Üí S4b). A thin additive root edit
  (de-`private` `pullbackTensorMap_isIso_of_isOpenImmersion`) is the cheapest unblock ‚Äî this is a structural
  change the planner must authorize (root is currently FROZEN under the even/odd interleave rule).
- `subst` on an equality of morphisms (`hjŒπ : j ‚â´ U.Œπ = V.Œπ`) only fires when the morphisms are genuine
  variables ‚Äî package as a `‚àÄ f‚ÇÅ f‚ÇÇ (h : f‚ÇÅ = f‚ÇÇ)` `have`, then `subst h`.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:tensorobj_restrict_iso_eq_pullback_tensor_map` (B1): corrected
  `\lean{‚Ä¶tensorObj_restrict_iso_eq_pullback_tensor_map}` ‚Üí `\lean{‚Ä¶tensorObj_restrict_iso_eq_pullbackTensorMap}`
  (must-fix from lean-vs-blueprint-checker; pin named a non-existent decl, was blocking `sync_leanok` resolution).
- No `\leanok` override: S4c's proof block is correctly UNMARKED ‚Äî its body is sorry-free but it transitively
  depends on B2's open sorry, so it is not yet a closed proof. `sync_leanok` is correct to withhold.

## sync_leanok
- iter=41 sha=b501e77 **+4 / ‚àí0** ‚Äî statement-level `\leanok` for the newly-stated bridges/squares.
